headline: PancakeSwap AMM: Core DEX infrastructure discovered on Ethereum and BSC; V2, V3, and Infinity routers catalogued; comprehensive chain and version coverage pending from accessible docs
short_headline: PancakeSwap AMM contracts surfaced across major chains

findings.text: BscScan and Etherscan name-tag searches: located Router V2 (0x10ED43C7 Ethereum; 0x05ff2b0d BSC), V3 Factory (0x0BFbCF9f Ethereum/BSC), V3 Swap Router (0x1b81D678 BSC), Smart Router (0x13f4ea83 Ethereum), Position Manager (0x46a15b0b Ethereum), CAKE Token (0x0e09fabb BSC; 0x152649eA Ethereum)

Developer docs reference pages (developer.pancakeswap.finance/contracts/**/addresses) confirm V2, V3, Universal Router, and Permit2 contracts across chains; full address tables inaccessible via direct fetch but searchable via block explorers and documentation references

PancakeSwap main docs (https://docs.pancakeswap.finance/#is-it-safe) lists verified BscScan contracts with in-scope signatures; audit page links present but page content not fetched; SlowMist confirmed as auditor for PancakeSwap in industry sources
GitHub pancake-v3-contracts and pancake-smart-contracts repos identified; no specific deployment artifact files (broadcast/hardhat-deploy/deployments.json) directly fetched in this run

Multi-chain coverage: Protocol.chains lists Binance, Ethereum, Base, Aptos, zkSync Era, Op_Bnb, Arbitrum, Linea, Polygon zkEVM, Monad; Ethereum and BSC confirmed with multiple contracts; remaining chains require per-chain explorer searches not yet exhausted

Factories identified (V2, V3) support pool creation; factory enumeration view methods (allPairs, allPools) present in ABIs but child-pool enumeration not performed in this run; capped at factory discovery pending reads

Role taxonomy: Router contracts classified as 'router'; Factory contracts as 'factory'; CAKE as 'token'; Position Manager as 'pool'; actor classes inferred from contract type but not verified via on-chain governance/timelock reads in this run

All addresses trace to verified block explorer sources (Etherscan, BscScan); no snippet-only sightings in admin_addresses; all entries cite fetched explorer pages or search results showing verified contract code

rationale.verdict: Discovery completed for major DEX infrastructure on Ethereum and BSC. V2/V3 router and factory contracts, CAKE governance token, position manager, and Universal Router all catalogued with block-explorer verification. Remaining 8 chains require per-chain explorer and docs enumeration; factory pool enumeration capped pending on-chain reads in control slice.

evidence.shows: PancakeSwap product overview confirming security audits and verified contracts on BscScan; lists 5 verified contract addresses with direct BscScan links for Router V2, Factory V2, and other core contracts
PancakeSwap V3: Factory contract on Ethereum with verified source code and owner() function; demonstrates V3 factory deployment
PancakeSwap: Factory V2 on Ethereum with verified contract; implements feeToSetter governance and allPairs enumeration
PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router on Ethereum with verified source code; handles V2, V3, and StableSwap routing
PancakeSwap V3: Nonfungible Position Manager on Ethereum with verified code; manages V3 liquidity positions as ERC-721 NFTs
PancakeSwap: Universal Router on Ethereum with permit2, seaport, and factory integrations; latest unified routing interface
PancakeSwap V3: Swap Router on Ethereum; stateless router for V3 pool swaps
PancakeSwap: Router v2 on BSC; multi-chain deployment evidence with Arbitrum, Base, opBNB, Polygon, Optimism, zkSync, Linea, Blast references
PancakeSwap: Router (v1-era) on BSC; older routing interface verified contract
PancakeSwap V3: Factory on BSC with owner governance and pool deployment capabilities
PancakeSwap V3: Swap Router on BSC; verified contract with full V3 swap interface
PancakeSwap Token (CAKE) on BSC; governance and reward token with verified BEP-20 contract; multichain references across 9+ chains
PancakeSwap Token (CAKE) on Ethereum; governance token with yield farming and staking mechanics
PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router on Arbitrum; proxy-pattern deployment with implementation logic for multi-swap routing
Developer documentation confirming V2 contracts (Factory, Router) sourced from GitHub repos; Uniswap V2 fork designation
Developer documentation confirming V3 contracts as Uniswap V3 fork; addresses table available (not directly accessible in this run)
PancakeSwap Infinity Universal Router documentation; latest routing version integrating Infinity and Permit2 protocols; fork of Uniswap v3 router
Official GitHub repository for PancakeSwap V3 smart contracts; contains deployment scripts and source code
Official GitHub repository containing all PancakeSwap smart contracts; multiple independent projects per contract module with test suites and configs

unknowns: D1-Aptos: Aptos chain block explorer not queried; PancakeSwap presence on Aptos not yet enumerated
D1-zkSync: zkSync Era (era.zksync.network) name-tag search not yet completed
D1-OpBNB: opBNB block explorer not yet queried; references found in router holders list but no dedicated D1 search
D1-Linea: lineascan.build search for PancakeSwap not yet performed
D1-Polygon-zkEVM: Polygon zkEVM explorer (zkevm.polygonscan.com) not yet searched
D1-Monad: Monad block explorer enumeration not attempted; may be testnet or future chain
D1-Base: Base block explorer name-tag search not completed; referenced in some holder records but not independently enumerated
D1-Optimism: Optimism explorer search not yet performed despite references in token holder data
D2-Deployed-contracts-doc: Alternative docs pages (e.g., /docs/contracts, /deployments) not enumerated; developer.pancakeswap.finance/contracts/* URLs accessible but address tables not fetched
D3: Audit PDFs from https://docs.pancakeswap.finance/welcome-to-pancakeswap/audits not fetched; SlowMist and other auditor names found but no audit reports accessed
D4-GitHub-artifacts: Foundry broadcast/ and hardhat-deploy/ directories not searched; no specific commit SHAs pinned for deployment artifacts
D6-Factory-enumeration: V2 and V3 factory allPairs/allPools methods not called; would require defipunkd read-API or on-chain calls capped at 50 per factory
D7-Actor-class-verification: Proxy admins, multisig signers, timelock parameters not yet read via defipunkd API; inferred from contract type only
D5-Base-dedicated: BaseScan address discovery pending; Base referenced in document context but no active D1 search
D5-Optimism-dedicated: Optimism explorer (optimistic.etherscan.io) not yet queried despite references in multicoin portfolio data

protocol_metadata.about: PancakeSwap is a decentralized exchange (DEX) and automated market maker (AMM) that enables users to swap tokens, earn liquidity provider fees, and participate in yield farming and staking. The protocol operates multiple versions (V2, V3, Infinity) across 10 blockchain networks, with CAKE serving as the governance and reward token. PancakeSwap implements a constant-product model (V2) and concentrated liquidity model (V3), allowing users to trade directly from their wallets without intermediaries.
